texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information, visit abp.io.
texts.OpenPlatform:ManageApps: Manage client credentials, status and validity windows.
texts.OpenPlatform:ManageVehicleAuthorizations: Configure vehicle control authorizations for open apps and maintain validity periods.
texts.OpenPlatform:SelectAppFromAppList: Open this page from the app management list for a specific app.
texts.OpenPlatform:SearchPlaceholder: Search by app name or ClientId
texts.OpenPlatform:Name: Name
texts.OpenPlatform:SecretHelp: The secret is shown only once. Store it securely.
texts.OpenPlatform:CopiedNotice: Copy and store the secret now.
texts.OpenPlatform:SignatureDebugDescription: Enter partner-provided request parameters and let the system generate the final signature with the current Open Platform signing algorithm.
texts.OpenPlatform:InputSectionDescription: All fields below are supplied by the integration partner. AppSecret is not stored.
texts.OpenPlatform:AppSecretHelp: Used only for this calculation and never persisted.
texts.OpenPlatform:ResultSectionDescription: The result area returns only the final signature for X-Signature.
texts.OpenPlatform:Tips:Timestamp: Use the exact timestamp string sent by the client.
texts.OpenPlatform:Tips:Query: Enter the raw query string without the path.
texts.OpenPlatform:Tips:Body: Enter the original request body. Leave empty for no body.
texts.OpenPlatform:Tips:Secret: Use AppSecret only for calculation and avoid exposing it in screenshots.
texts.OpenPlatform:SignatureDebugPermissionDen: You are signed in, but you do not have the Signature Debug permission.
texts.OpenPlatform:ConfirmResetSecret: Reset the app secret? The old secret will stop working immediately.
texts.VNext:ExternalService:BusinessError: External service processing failed. Please try again later or contact the administrator.
texts.VNext:ExternalService:MaiHong:BusinessEr: MaiHong service processing failed. Please try again later or contact the administrator.
texts.VNext:ExternalService:MaiHong:DeviceAlre: The device is already bound. Please check the device ID.
texts.VehicleCapabilities:Title: Vehicle Capabilities
texts.VehicleCapabilities:Description: Debug current info, trips, tracks and alerts by vehicle.
texts.VehicleCapabilities:CurrentInfoHelp: Combined vehicle profile, status and location view.
texts.VehicleCapabilities:NoCurrentInfo: No current info. Select a vehicle and query first.
texts.VehicleCapabilities:TripsHelp: Read trips by time range. Shows up to 20 items.
texts.VehicleCapabilities:TrackHelp: Select a trip to inspect track points.
texts.VehicleCapabilities:AlertsHelp: Read vehicle alerts by time range.
